scene.imageSummary: Lukas stands motionless with his back pressed against the broad linden tree, a bright red apple balanced on his head, his gaze fixed straight ahead. The marketplace stretches empty before him, with the crowd blurred in the distant background.

setting.description: Medieval marketplace with grey-brown cobblestones, broad old linden tree with dark furrowed bark and autumn-yellow foliage at the right edge. Empty plaza stretches across, townspeople gathered in soft focus far behind. Morning light, overcast sky.
setting.lighting: Overcast morning light, soft and diffused
setting.camera: Close-up, slightly from below eye level
setting.depthLayers: Lukas large center foreground against tree trunk, empty cobblestone plaza stretches back, crowd tiny and blurred far background

characters.name: Lukas
characters.action: Standing motionless with back against tree, staring straight ahead

objects.name: Apfel auf Lukas' Kopf
objects.position: balanced on Lukas's head, bright red

objects.name: Linde auf dem Marktplatz
objects.position: right, broad dark trunk with moss at base

scene.translatedSummary: Lukas steht völlig reglos mit dem Rücken an die breite Linde gedrückt, ein leuchtend roter Apfel balanciert auf seinem Kopf, sein Blick starrt geradeaus. Der Marktplatz erstreckt sich leer vor ihm, die Menschenmenge verwischt im fernen Hintergrund.
